Posted at 7:52 AM EST

Y'know something weird I noticed, some people take j.ai way too seriously 😭

While I understand getting recognition for your bots is awesome (obviously, I giggle and kick my feet at y'alls reviews every day 🙏) someee people just take this platform way too seriously 😟

Hacking to get more chats??? Insane. I remember a while ago on the j.ai discord, specifically in the channel for recommending new features, someone asked if there could be a way to pay and have your bots promoted more??? like hello, is it THAT serious...

I don't get it cause I don't see how getting fame on JANITOR AI is any sort of a flex 😭😭😭????? Like I would never boast about having 17k+ followers, CAUSE WHERE IS THE BRAG??? JANITOR AI??? THE AI PORN SITE??????????? It would be humiliating if any of my friends found out I was even on this site, I wouldn't even be able to comprehend the embarrassment if they found out I MAKE BOTS 😟😟😟

moving on,

I have not written smutty smut in a while but I feel like I am slowly getting there again...I'm not entirely sure as to why I haven't been able to get myself to write any of it, but here's a small start 😭

Also in this bot my man is indeed a virgin 😜🙏 also they haven't done anything besides some touching and making out yadda yadda, like not even seeing eachother naked

Feel free to change that tho 😗

I went a little crazy with the bot testing 😭😭

anyways,

Enjoy!!!

Love,

Mama Down
